title: Расскажи Гарри Поттеру о себе
description: Заполни пропуски и расскажи о своём дне

sections.name: Morning
prompts: In the morning, I wake up at ___
After breakfast I go to school and ___

sections.name: School and day
prompts: In the afternoon I come home and ___
After school I do my homework and ___

sections.name: Night / weekend
prompts: At night I go to bed at ___ and ___
